content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated the parsimonious bead creation policy gaps in src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs: project-scoped workflow.parsimonious_bead_creation is now loaded for propose-new-bead handling, existing-bead ownership lookup runs before below-threshold pending decisions when enabled, and exact-title/rendered-description recovery is gated behind the proposal threshold with created journal metadata including threshold_count and existing_bead_lookup_ran.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected the propose-new-bead handler, current diff, related config lookup, and regression tests to map each pending amendment to the active code path.
1. [Completed] Moved project-aware parsimonious policy loading into handle_propose_new_bead and threaded project_id through the handler call surface used by tests.
2. [Completed] Ensured enabled parsimonious policy runs existing-open-bead similarity lookup before returning below-threshold Pending, so strong matches comment as CoveredByExistingBead instead of silently pending.
3. [Completed] Kept the exact-title/rendered-description recovery path threshold-gated and updated its ProposedBeadCreated journal event to include policy metadata.
4. [Completed] Added or preserved regression coverage for below-threshold existing matches, below-threshold recovery prevention, and project-scoped proposal_threshold behavior.
5. [Skipped] Run br lint after backlog edits.

## Validation Evidence

- nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub handle_propose_new_bead_ -- --nocapture passed: 29 propose-new-bead tests passed.
- nix develop -c cargo test --features test-stub passed: 1323 lib tests, 378 cli tests, 1 run_attach_tmux test, 1126 unit tests, and doc tests completed with only pre-existing ignored tests.
- nix develop -c cargo clippy -- -D warnings passed.
- nix develop -c cargo fmt --check passed.
- nix build passed.
- git diff --check -- src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs passed.

## Outstanding Risks

- Pre-existing dirty live orchestration/backlog files under .beads/ and .ralph-burning/ were left untouched.
- br lint could not be run because the br binary is unavailable in this environment; no backlog edits were made for this remediation.
